overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a leather trench coat walking along a wet riverside promenade in a modern city. The scene features contemporary glass architecture, autumn foliage, and overcast lighting with reflective wet pavement suggesting recent rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern waterfront promenade with glass architecture

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the wet riverside promenade with weapon visible on back

entered.detail: tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade and exposed structural elements
calm water surface reflecting the overcast sky
black metal railing separating promenade from water edge
deciduous trees with yellow and orange fallen leaves scattered on pavement
digital advertising pillar with illuminated display
modern wooden slatted benches lined along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet stone promenade beside a river, with a modern glass building on the right and metal railings along the water. Autumn trees line the path and digital advertising kiosks appear periodically. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting with reflections on the damp pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving riverside path with bridge view

events.description: modern white footbridge becomes visible spanning across the river ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved promenade path with slight turn toward the bridge view

entered.detail: modern white cable-stayed pedestrian bridge with sleek architectural design

segments.scene_description: As the path curves gently to the right, a striking white modern footbridge comes into view across the river. The glass building recedes into the background while the water appears closer on the left. The character maintains a steady walking pace along the damp tiled surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: promenade approaching building entrance with stairs

events.description: passing close by newspaper vendor with red and white umbrella on the right
approaching stairs and covered entrance area at the end of the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking past the newspaper vendor and approaching the building entrance stairs

notable_agents.action: newspaper vendor standing under red and white umbrella holding up a paper

entered.detail: street vendor cart with red and white umbrella and newspaper display
dark modern building entrance with glass doors and overhead canopy
wide concrete staircase leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a newspaper vendor standing under a distinctive red and white umbrella, then continues toward a modern building entrance with concrete stairs. The glass building now dominates the right side of the frame up close, while the river remains visible on the left. The path leads toward a covered entrance area with digital signage visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet riverside promenade that shifts from an open walkway into a more enclosed urban entrance. It begins with the character walking past autumn trees and digital kiosks beside a modern glass building, where the overcast sky casts diffused reflections across the damp stone. As the path curves gently to the right, the glass architecture recedes and the view opens up to reveal a striking white modern footbridge spanning the river. The scene then shifts toward the sidewalk as the character passes a newspaper vendor under a red and white umbrella, before turning toward a concrete staircase. Finally, the camera closes in on a covered building entrance with digital signage, with the towering glass facade now dominating the right side of the frame.
